declaration: All J2 production code in core/enterprise/, core/composition/root.py, and tests/ complies with Canon LAW 1, 2, 9, 11, 23-27 and RULE 1-5. Zero cross-tenant data leakage. All enterprise_trace_id values are non-empty.

laws.title: IInterface Compliance
laws.evidence: 4 concrete implementations (TenantRouter, UsageMeter, BillingEngine, ComplianceAuditor) match ITenantRouter, IUsageMeter, IBillingEngine, IComplianceAuditor protocol signatures exactly. All methods accept enterprise_trace_id and return Dict[str, Any].

laws.title: Concretion Over Abstraction
laws.evidence: No abstract base classes in core/enterprise/. All 7 classes (TenantRouter, UsageMeter, BillingEngine, ComplianceAuditor, IsolationStateMachine, EnterpriseTraceCorrelator) are concrete implementations. 0 ABC imports in enterprise/.

laws.title: Governance Independence
laws.evidence: BillingEngine.process_payment_state manages PaymentState transitions without coupling to payment execution. TenantRouter uses policy-based isolation decisions. ComplianceAuditor.validate_gdpr_soc2_compliance is framework-driven, not runtime-dependent.

laws.title: No Global Mutable State
laws.evidence: All state is instance-scoped: TenantRouter._tenants, UsageMeter._buffers, BillingEngine._invoices, ComplianceAuditor._audit_entries, IsolationStateMachine._transition_history, EnterpriseTraceCorrelator._traces. No global mutable state, no shared tenant caches, no class-level registries.

laws.title: Traceability (enterprise_trace_id)
laws.evidence: All 16 protocol methods accept enterprise_trace_id parameter. All return dicts include trace_id field. EnterpriseTraceCorrelator provides 6 propagate_to_* methods for F1→Router→Meter→Billing→Auditor→F4 chain. test_enterprise_trace_id_propagation_across_layers.py proves full chain with 13 tests.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Multi-Tenant Isolation
laws.evidence: TenantRouter.register_tenant maps tenants to isolation_policy (strict/shared/isolated). G-L1 enforced on T3 transition: cross-tenant access requires shared_resource_flag=True AND scope_verified=True AND target.policy!=STRICT. validate_tenant_scope implements the same logic. UsageMeter partitions records by tenant_id.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Usage & Billing
laws.evidence: UsageMeter.record_operation uses Decimal for cost_units precision. BillingEngine._TIER_RATES maps 5 pricing tiers (free/starter/professional/enterprise/custom) to per-operation rates. Enforce quota checks via TenantRouter.enforce_quota. G-L2 guards QUOTA_CHECK→ROUTE_EXECUTE.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Payment State Machine
laws.evidence: BillingEngine VALID_PAYMENT_TRANSITIONS defines 6-state SM: PENDING→PROCESSING→PAID, PENDING→FAILED→WRITTEN_OFF, PENDING→DISPUTED→PROCESSING. process_payment_state validates transitions and maintains invoice_history for rollback (RULE 5). suspend_on_default checks overdue threshold.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Compliance Frameworks
laws.evidence: ComplianceAuditor.validate_gdpr_soc2_compliance checks 3 conditions: trace_id non-empty, actor resolvable, resource within tenant boundary. ComplianceReport with PASS/FLAG/FAIL status. 5 ComplianceFramework values in protocol definition.

laws.title: Service Ownership — Audit Identity & Verification
laws.evidence: G-A1 Deterministic Audit Guard: SHA-256(tenant_id + action + actor + target_resource + compliance_framework + retention_policy). Same inputs always yield same 32-char hash. Enforcement in IsolationStateMachine._evaluate_g_a1 and ComplianceAuditor.validate_gdpr_soc2_compliance hash matching. archive_logs moves old entries to cold storage.

rules.title: Determinism
rules.evidence: UsageRecord.record_hash = SHA-256(tenant_id + operation_type + cost_units + trace_id)[:32]. G-A1 hash = SHA-256(tenant + action + actor + resource + framework + retention)[:32]. BillingEngine.apply_pricing_tier: same tier + usage → same total. All confirmed by tests.

rules.title: Input Validation
rules.evidence: BillingEngine.generate_invoice rejects negative total_amount. EnterpriseTraceCorrelator.generate_enterprise_trace_id ensures non-empty (min 28 chars). All protocol methods typed (str, Decimal, datetime.date). ComplianceAuditor validates trace_id non-empty.

rules.title: Safety Guards
rules.evidence: G-L1-G-L5 fully implemented in IsolationStateMachine with 5 _evaluate_g_* methods. All 5 guards tested in TestLeakageGuardGL1-GL5 (16 tests). G-L1 blocks cross-tenant without scope_verified. G-L3 requires isolation_boundary. G-A1 blocks on hash mismatch.

rules.title: Trace Propagation
rules.evidence: EnterpriseTraceCorrelator.propagate_to_* methods cover all 6 layers. TestEndToEndPropagation::test_full_chain_f1_to_f4 proves 6-layer chain integrity. All 4 enterprise components call trace_correlator.propagate_to_* after each operation.

rules.title: Rollback & Recovery
rules.evidence: BillingEngine._invoice_history maintains state history for rollback. process_payment_state is idempotent (no-op if already in new_state). UsageMeter.flush_to_billing clears buffer after successful flush. Suspension guard (G-L5) prevents double-suspension.

stop_conditions.condition: All 4 enterprise protocols implemented and matching design
TestLeakageGuardEnforcement passes (no cross-tenant without scope_verified + policy_check)
CompositionRoot wires J2 components without breaking LAW 11 (no global state)
All files carry # LAW-XX / # RULE-X comments
No modifications outside allowed paths (core/enterprise/, core/composition/, tests/)
